items.name: Oft3r/agentic-trading-desk
items.full_text: AI-assisted trading desk for short-term technical analysis on stocks & ETFs via Robinhood MCP. Deterministic Python engines score each asset on a three-pillar framework (Trend · Momentum · Macro-Sentiment) using EMA, RSI, MACD, TRIX & Bollinger Bands. The AI fetches data; the scripts compute; the human approves every order.
